case_title: CESPEDES, JUAN vs. NOGY, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT NOGY, STEVE HODGE, STEVE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CESPEDES, JUAN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-18-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOGY, STEVE HODGE, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 417 GOUGH STREET #127, SAN FRANCISCO $1,620.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: DEFTS' JOINT ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL FOR FURTHER PREPARATION IS DENIED; NO GOOD CAUSE FOUND BY COURT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT NOGY, STEVE HODGE, STEVE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NOGY, STEVE HODGE, STEVE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT NOGY, STEVE HODGE, STEVE
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON FEB-18-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 11:10AM CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. BRENDA CRUZ KEITH FOR THE PLTF AND THE DEFTS STEVEN NOGY AND STEVEN HODGE ARE BOTH IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S&E AND PLTF EX#1 EX#2 ARE ADMITTED. BOTH SIDES REST. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: AFTER DISCUSSIONS WITH BOTH DEFTS, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFTS DO NOT HAVE JURY INSTRUCTIONS AND IT IS UNLIKELY THAT DEFTS WILL BE ABLE TO PREPARE JURY INSTRUCTIONS BEFORE TRIAL. COURT ORDERS JURY DEMAND STRICKEN; CASE TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
